topics: AI agent development, AgentFactory courses, Panaversity programs, AI education, company info, team & leadership, pricing, enrollment, curriculum
business_description: AgentFactory by Panaversity is a platform for learning to build AI agents and autonomous AI systems. It offers courses, books, and programs taught by Zia Khan (CEO & founder of Panaversity) and co-authors including Wania Kazmi (AI educator and co-author of the AgentFactory course materials). Panaversity's mission is to democratize AI-native education.
